description_long: This is a compact, armored combat tactical vehicle with a robust, angular body designed for urban operations. The vehicle features a high ground clearance, reinforced bumpers, and a spare tire mounted on the rear door. Its exterior is characterized by thick, paneled doors and windows, suggesting enhanced protection for occupants. The roof is flat and appears to have mounting points for additional equipment, while the front grille is protected by a sturdy guard. The wheels are large with deep-treaded tires suitable for off-road and urban terrain. No visible weapon mounts, camouflage, or military markings are present on the exterior.
description: A compact, armored tactical vehicle with reinforced body panels, high ground clearance, and deep-treaded tires, designed for urban and rugged environments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the spare tire mounted on the back door and reinforced rear bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick doors, large wheels, and side step for entry.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the protective grille guard, angular hood, and robust bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible door details and rear-mounted spare tire.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body appears to be covered in thick, angular armor plating, including doors, hood, and rear. No visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_tire_type: Four large, deep-treaded off-road tires with reinforced sidewalls.
